case_title: TIBOR SISKO VS. DANIEL R RICHARDSON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SISKO, TIBOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REVIEW TO JUL-11-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT IS DIRECTED TO PROVIDE BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT BY JULY 1, 2014 TO COURT AND PLAINTIFFS. MATTER TO GO OFF CALENDAR IN BANKRUPTCY RESULTS IN FULL DISCHARGE", PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY HER ATTORNEY MICHAEL SMITH. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SISKO, TIBOR AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DANIEL R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DANIEL R

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 SERVED SEP-06-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DANIEL R
